title: Token Credit Tracker

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Token Credit Tracker

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f'/><g transform='translate(200, 150)'><circle cx='0' cy='0' r='40' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='-35' y='-35' font-size='24' fill='#B7D7CD'>Balance</text></g><g transform='translate(200, 150)'><rect x='-120' y='0' width='240' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='-5' y='25' font-size='24' fill='#B7D7CD'>Token Credits</text></g><g transform='translate(200, 200)'><rect x='-80' y='0' width='160' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='-40' y='15' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>100</text></g><g transform='translate(250, 200)'><rect x='-50' y='0' width='100' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='-25' y='15' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>increment</text></g><g transform='translate(250, 230)'><rect x='-50' y='0' width='100' height='30' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='-25' y='15' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>reset</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Use only the specified colors for the design
Implement interactive state updates for the balance counter
Include a reset button that resets the balance to 0

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Token Credit Tracker

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, increment button logic, reset button logic, and correct initial balance value.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
